## 📝 Pull Request Description

### 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style/formatting (linting, code organization)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes, code improvements)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements
- [ ] 🔒 Security improvements

### 📋 Description
Briefly describe what this pull request does and why it's needed.

### 🔗 Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)
Closes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

## 🧪 Testing

### ✅ Test Plan
Describe how you tested this change:

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Browser verification passed (`npm run verify:browser`)
- [ ] Linting passed (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Build successful (`npm run build`)

### 🧪 Test Cases
List specific test cases you've verified:

1. **Test Case 1**: [Description]
   - Steps: [Steps to reproduce]
   - Expected: [Expected result]
   - Actual: [Actual result]

2. **Test Case 2**: [Description]
   - Steps: [Steps to reproduce]
   - Expected: [Expected result]
   - Actual: [Actual result]

### 📱 Browser Testing
Tested on:
- [ ] Chrome (version: ___)
- [ ] Safari (version: ___)
- [ ] Firefox (version: ___)
- [ ] Edge (version: ___)
- [ ] Mobile Safari (iOS ___)
- [ ] Mobile Chrome (Android ___)

## 📸 Screenshots/Videos

If your changes affect the UI, please include:

### Before
[Attach screenshot or describe the previous state]

### After
[Attach screenshot or describe the new state]

## 🔧 Technical Details

### 📁 Files Changed
List the main files modified and why:

- `src/components/Component.tsx` - [Reason for change]
- `src/utils/helper.ts` - [Reason for change]
- `docs/README.md` - [Reason for change]

### 🔄 Breaking Changes
If this PR introduces breaking changes, please describe:

- What changed: [Description]
- Migration path: [How to update existing code]
- Deprecation timeline: [When old code will be removed]

### 🔍 Code Review Checklist
Please check all that apply:

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

## 📚 Documentation

### 📖 Updated Documentation
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Component documentation
- [ ] User guide
- [ ] Developer guide

### 🔄 Migration Guide
If this change requires users to update their code or configuration, provide migration instructions:

```bash
# Example migration steps
# 1. Update configuration
# 2. Run migration script
# 3. Update imports
```

## 🚀 Deployment

### 🌍 Environment Impact
- [ ] Development environment tested
- [ ] Staging environment tested (if applicable)
- [ ] Production deployment considerations noted

### 📦 Dependencies
- [ ] No new dependencies added
- [ ] New dependencies: [List any new npm packages]
- [ ] Updated dependencies: [List any updated packages]

## 🤝 Additional Notes

Any additional information, context, or considerations for the reviewers.
